rationale: This is a revert-of-revert-of-revert PR (title 'Revert "Revert "Revert ..."' six times deep) which mechanically reverts PR #12 in the chain. The diff content is a single file deletion of .github/workflows/gem-push.yml (a Ruby Gem publishing workflow), which is precisely what reverting an earlier 'add gem-push workflow' commit would produce. The change accurately implements the stated revert operation: no test modification, no swallowed errors, just removing a CI workflow file. Placement under negatives/reverted is editorial (later-reverted PR) rather than evidence of cheat patterns in the diff itself.
